settings.title: Elegance in Every Thread
settings.text: Discover our latest collection crafted from 100% sustainable premium silk and organic cotton.
settings.story_text:
At Lumina, we believe that true luxury is defined by the endurance of both style and substance.

We source only the finest organic textiles, partnering with heritage mills that share our vision for a regenerative future.
